title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Tenders
text:
# Tenders Filter Past Tenders
To
Filter | Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned hereby invites sealed quotation of rate from the resourceful Supplier/ Vendor for supply of GCI sheets in connection with Mte of AWCs in various VCs under Mandwi RD Block. | On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned hereby invites sealed quotation of rate from the resourceful Supplier/ Vendor for supply of GCI sheets in connection with Mte of AWCs in various VCs under Mandwi RD Block, West Tripura during FY 2025-26. | 26/12/2025 | 01/01/2026 | |
| On behalf of the Governor of Tripura the undersigned hereby invites scaled quotation of rate from the resourceful supplier/vendor for supply & installation of PA system at the conference hall of the Block Development Officer, Mandwi RD Block. | On behalf of the Governor of Tripura the undersigned hereby invites scaled quotation of rate from the resourceful supplier/vendor for supply & installation of PA system at the conference hall of the Block Development Officer, Mandwi RD Block, West Tripuraduring the financial year 2025-26. | 16/12/2025 | 22/12/2025 | |
| NOTICE INVITING TENDER | On behalf of the Government of Tripura, the undersigned invites sealed Quotation in prescribed format the reputed & Authorized Dealers/Supplier/Farm/Agency/Co-operative Society having valid Trade License, GST Registration with Clearance Certificate, PanCard & Bank details for supply of Sewing machine as per rate and condition as quoted herein under Sdar Sub-Division, West Tripura.

| On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned hereby invites sealed quotation of rate from the resourceful Supplier/ Vendor for supply of GCI sheets in connection with Mte of AWCs in various VCs under Mandwi RD Block. | On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned hereby invites sealed quotation of rate from the resourceful Supplier/ Vendor for supply of GCI sheets in connection with Mte of AWCs in various VCs under Mandwi RD Block, West Tripura during FY 2025-26. | 26/12/2025 | 01/01/2026 | |

| NOTICE INVITING TENDER | On behalf of the Government of Tripura, the undersigned invites sealed Quotation in prescribed format the reputed & Authorized Dealers/Supplier/Farm/Agency/Co-operative Society having valid Trade License, GST Registration with Clearance Certificate, PanCard & Bank details for supply of Sewing machine as per rate and condition as quoted herein under Sdar Sub-Division, West Tripura.
